modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: XPanel and Touch Panel are unresponsive in the smart classroom.

full_description_text:  
I was trying to use the Crestron XPanel and Touch Panel in the conference room, but nothing happened when I touched the screen. The XPanel kept saying it couldn't connect, and the Touch Panel just stayed blank or showed a white screen. It felt like the system was offline, and I even got an error message about the connection being disconnected. It’s really frustrating because I just wanted to get things started!
short_description: XPanel and Touch Panel are unresponsive in the smart classroom.
